'''Rachott''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologist]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]].

==Biography==
In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], she was stationed in the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 12]]. She was in charge of the analysis of the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] harvest and discovered that the plant was losing its medical application. The boss of the xenobotanists should have made public these results, but the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] agent [[Kaird]] bribed him and the information remained as a secret. Rachott was in love with a [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] stationed on the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7|RMSU-7]], [[Rorand Zuzz]], and told him this important event. Then, Rorand shared this information with the journalist [[Den Dhur]].

{{Char-stub}}
